home.desc: Dive into an immersive journey through state systems, territorial disputes, geopolitical blocs, and the forces that shape our world. Prepare to learn geography with cutting-edge interactive tools.
home.timeline_chal_desc: Drag events into the correct chronological order.
home.feat1_desc: Explore political borders, territorial changes, and geopolitical zones with dynamic SVG maps.
home.feat2_desc: Earn XP, unlock badges, climb ranks, and compete on leaderboards as you master each topic.
home.feat3_desc: Professional MCQ system with instant feedback, detailed explanations, and certificate generation.
home.feat4_desc: Drag-and-drop borders, simulate alliances, and explore how the political map has evolved.
home.tl1_desc: Birth of the modern state system and concept of national sovereignty.
home.tl2_desc: European powers partition Africa, reshaping the political map of an entire continent.
home.tl3_desc: A new world order emerges from the ashes of WWII, establishing global governance.
home.tl4_desc: The collapse creates 15 new nations and ends the bipolar world order.
home.tl5_desc: New alliances, territorial disputes, and the rise of multipolar world dynamics.
home.news_subtitle: Track the latest improvements made to the platform.

lessons.title: Lesson
lessons.subtitle: Deep-dive into the core pillars of Political Geography
lessons.no_content: No content available yet for this module.

games.title: Interactive
games.subtitle: Test your knowledge with these dynamic challenges
games.map_quiz_desc: Click on the correct location for each target city, capital, or landmark. Difficulty increases as you progress.
games.geo_sim_desc: Drag real geopolitical borders onto a world map. Snap them into place and score points for accuracy.
games.timeline_chal_desc: Sort 5 major geopolitical events into the correct chronological order before time runs out.
games.drag_hint: Drag borders to their correct geopolitical locations
games.regime_desc: Look at the image of a state and guess whether it's a Monarchy or a Republic!
games.city_guesser_desc: Identify famous cities from aerial views. Test your geographical intuition!
games.shape_guesser_desc: Guess the country based only on its silhouette. A true test of cartographic memory.
games.seterra_subtitle: Locate capitals on the map, continent by continent
games.seterra_europe_desc: Locate all European capitals on the interactive map.
games.seterra_africa_desc: Test your knowledge of African capitals.
games.seterra_americas_desc: From Ottawa to Buenos Aires — do you know all the capitals?
games.seterra_asia_desc: The largest continent — can you find all capitals?
games.seterra_world_desc: The ultimate challenge — all world capitals on one map!

tests.title: Practice
tests.subtitle: Professional MCQ system with instant feedback

shop.title: Geo
shop.subtitle: Spend your Compass Coins on exclusive operational assets.
shop.item_banner_world_desc: A classic cartographic representation for true geographers.
shop.item_banner_cyber_desc: Neon lights and futuristic metropolis aesthetics.
shop.item_banner_topo_desc: The ultimate agent dossier background. Exudes authority.
shop.item_avatar_explorer_desc: An avatar for those who prefer boots on the ground.
shop.item_theme_volcanic_desc: Unlock the aggressive Volcanic Red theme for your dossier.
shop.item_powerup_chronos_desc: Grants a permanent +10 seconds time extension in the Timeline Challenge.

profile.no_assets: No assets owned yet. Visit the Geo-Market to purchase banners and avatars.

ai.subtitle: Your personal political geography assistant
ai.greeting: Hello! I am your GeoAI assistant. Ask me anything about political geography!

settings.sfx_desc: Volume for clicks, notifications, and alerts.
settings.music_desc: Volume for background music and games.
settings.reset_desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a password reset link.

geo_sim.sidebar_desc: Drag each bloc to its correct zone on the map.
geo_sim.drag_bottom_hint: ↕ Drag blocs from the left onto the marked zones
